archetypes.name: Anxious Planner
archetypes.behavioral_signature: Converts on loss framing and scarcity. Stress spikes at ambiguous pricing. Resistant to gain framing.
archetypes.description: Driven by fear of missing out and losing access. Highly responsive to countdown timers, scarcity signals, and 'you'll lose X' messaging.

archetypes.name: Social Follower
archetypes.behavioral_signature: Follows crowd signals. Converts on Most Popular badges and user counts. Ignores feature tables.
archetypes.description: Needs social validation before committing. '50,000 teams use Pro' converts this segment. Peer testimonials outperform feature lists.

archetypes.name: Spontaneous Mover
archetypes.behavioral_signature: Bounces off complex pricing pages. Converts only on single bold value statement. Hates annual commitments.
archetypes.description: Impulsive decision-maker who acts on immediate value. Complex pricing tables cause page abandonment. One bold CTA converts.

archetypes.name: Authority Truster
archetypes.behavioral_signature: Follows recommended tier without extensive evaluation. Converts on official signals. Unmoved by peer proof.
archetypes.description: Trusts expert recommendations and official badges. 'Recommended by industry leaders' and 'Best for teams' labels drive conversion.

archetypes.name: Indifferent Drifter
archetypes.behavioral_signature: Resists all conversion. Stays free indefinitely. Calibrates realistic conversion ceiling.
archetypes.description: Content with free tier. No urgency, no social pressure. Long-term nurture or usage-based triggers are the only conversion path.
